title: Blue Star India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Blue Star India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
